headline: Clear calendar and empty comms give you a rare deep-work day — use it to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are available next session
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); without them you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, directly supports the Evals key deliverable for 26.4+; no meetings today means this is the day to make real headway

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR Confluence page for updated metrics and align your design doc with current OKR language
must_make_progress.why: Ensures AE-1079 ties to stated company goals around evals adoption and agentic initiative milestones

must_communicate_with.about: Align on feasibility of generated evals without ground truth — get their input before finalizing design doc
Check if DeepRAG/BatchTransform pattern updates have implications for the no-ground-truth eval approach

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

evals_adoption.vs_goal: AE-1079 design doc is prerequisite to expanding evals without ground truth

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Resolve credentials ASAP.
Snowflake metrics integration is down (empty password) — product telemetry and funnel health are blind.
AE-1079 has no due date set — consider setting one to maintain accountability and signal priority to stakeholders.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for spillover into your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations, decisions, or customer interactions visible today due to data source outages — restoring Salesforce/Snowflake access is the highest-leverage operational fix.
outcomes.product_adoption: Advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) directly enables broader evals adoption by removing the ground-truth data barrier for customers.

slack_summary: Clear calendar and zero inbound give you a pure deep-work day. Top priority: make substantial progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc) — it's your only active ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics. No meetings today.
